title: Retrieval Review: Responsive Systems
summary: Retrieval Review: Responsive Systems retrieves prior skills in an original changed content capability media and container constraints scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply responsive mobile first, responsive content breakpoints, responsive media queries, responsive images, responsive embedded media, responsive container queries, responsive test matrix in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real changed content capability media and container constraints artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Continue the Accessible Resource Inventory responsive-system work here. -->

options.text: Changed content capability media and container constraints case 1: mobile first means targeting one standard phone width and adding desktop overrides later.
Changed content capability media and container constraints case 1: make the unqueried base complete at constrained widths, then layer enhancements from observed content needs without removing tasks.
Changed content capability media and container constraints case 1: hide secondary table columns on phones because narrow layouts need less information.
